channel.title: MarkSignal AU filing signals
channel.description: Evidence-linked signals from selected Australian trade mark filings.

item.title: EMBER GRID | Civic Horizon Limited
item.description: First observed filing by this applicant in Nice classes 9, 39, 42.; First observed filing in 1,245 days.; Mark wording contains previously unobserved token: GRID.

item.title: NORTHSTAR NEBULA BUSINESS | Northstar Labs Pty Ltd
item.description: First observed filing by this applicant in Nice class 35.; Part of a 3-mark related filing cluster within 7 days.; Mark wording contains previously unobserved token: BUSINESS.

item.title: NORTHSTAR NEBULA WALLET | Northstar Labs Pty Ltd
item.description: First observed filing by this applicant in Nice class 9.; Part of a 3-mark related filing cluster within 7 days.; Mark wording contains previously unobserved token: WALLET.

item.title: NORTHSTAR NEBULA PAY | Northstar Labs Pty Ltd
item.description: First observed filing by this applicant in Nice class 36.; Part of a 3-mark related filing cluster within 7 days.; First observed filing in 1,611 days.; Mark wording contains previously unobserved token: PAY.

item.title: PAPER KITE PLAY | Paper Kite Group Pty Ltd
item.description: First observed filing by this applicant in Nice classes 9, 41.; First observed filing in 500 days.; Mark wording contains previously unobserved token: PLAY.
